EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Referee Invite Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: We’d appreciate your help with a reference
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE'D APPRECIATE YOUR INSIGHTS.
Hi {!Referee.FirstName},
Hope this email finds you well. {!TR1__Candidates_Marketed__c.Name} has applied for a {Job title} role with Alliance Rural & Remote Health, and they have listed you as a reference. We’d greatly appreciate it if you could take a few moments to share your insights about their professional experience and suitability for the role.
You can provide the reference by filling out this form: {Link to reference collection form}
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
